> `registry.ts`

**Methods**

## Types

### ArtifactType
> `types.ts`

```ts
type ArtifactType = "epoch_bundle" | "epoch_proof" | "memory_snapshot" | "deploy_artifact" | "passport_metadata" | "nft_metadata" | "mmr_checkpoint"
```

### StorageTier
> `types.ts`

```ts
type StorageTier = "permanent" | "evolving"
```
